# FFERR_INTERNAL | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_INTERNAL ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_internal)

-  FFERR_INTERNAL 

Global Variable# FFERR_INTERNAL

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_INTERNAL: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_internal#Discussion)

The IOForceFededbackLib driver has detected an internal fault. Often this occurs because of an unexpected internal code path.
